$description: Frozen HTTP wire contract for @qlan-ro/mainframe-core. Generated by scripts/extract-contract.mjs — do not hand-edit.
method: HTTP routes enumerated by walking the live Express router stack (each factory mounted with a Proxy ctx); per-endpoint request schema, response shape, and status codes derived by TypeScript-AST analysis of src/server/routes/*.ts.

authModel.whenSecretUnset: middleware is a no-op; all routes are unauthenticated

loopbackBypass.behavior: loopback callers are never rejected; token is validated and attached only if present

websocket.tokenSource: token query param on the upgrade URL
websocket.forwardedFor: x-forwarded-for first hop is trusted only when the raw peer is loopback (cloudflared)

knownDeviations: GET /health returns a bare status object, not the {success,data} envelope.
POST /api/projects returns 409 with a data payload alongside success:false on duplicate.

response.note: per-plugin; PluginManager.router owns a listing route plus one sub-router per plugin

dynamicMounts.notes: Dynamic mount (src/server/http.ts: app.use("/api/plugins", pluginManager.router)). Builtin plugins (todos) register sub-routes at runtime; not enumerable from a static router walk. Rust v1 keeps builtins behind this surface.

request.name: confirmBodySchema
ListQuery
request.zodSource:
z.object({
    project: z.string().optional(),
    tags: z
      .string()
      .optional()
      .refine(
        (v) =>
          v === undefined ||
          v
            .split(',')
            .map((s) => s.trim())
            .filter(Boolean)
            .every((t) => TAG_NAME_PATTERN.test(t)),
        { message: 'Tag values must match [a-z0-9-]+' },
      ),
    synthetic: z.string().optional(),
  })

request.zodSource:
z.object({
  sessionId: z.string().regex(/^[a-zA-Z0-9-]+$/),
  adapterId: z.string().min(1),
  title: z.string().max(500).optional(),
  createdAt: z.string().datetime().optional(),
  modifiedAt: z.string().datetime().optional(),
})
